chinese_news.title: 增长停滞两年后，H&M重组全球架构，大中华区降级｜独家
chinese_news.summary:
文｜贺哲馨

编辑｜乔芊

36氪独家获悉，瑞典快时尚巨头H&M正在推进一场波及全球的组织架构调整：原本按地理划分的9大区域业务板块被打散，重新拆分为26个销售市场，并以市场表现为依据归入四个新设立的“洲级”事业部管辖。

大中华区在这轮调整中降级为26个销售市场之一，归属新成立的亚太洲级事业部（Continent Asia Pacific）管理。原大中华区总裁司懿德（Saed El-Achkar）将出任该事业部董事总经理（Managing Director），任命预计在6月25日集团半年报发布前后正式对外公布，新架构于7月1日落地运转。

除大中华区外，亚太事业部还管辖东南亚（总部吉隆坡）、东北亚（东京）、印度（班加罗尔）、澳大利亚和新西兰（悉尼）

chinese_news.title: 高瓴出手了一家消费级柔性机器人公司，要把“大白”从电影搬进现实家庭｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，消费级柔性机器人公司SoulX日前已完成数千万元天使轮融资，投资方为高瓴创投，向阳资本担任独家财务顾问。资金将重点投入产品持续迭代、技术研发，并加快供应链与规模化交付体系搭建。首款机器人产品MoYa将于2026年下半年正式发布。

SoulX隶属于深圳市弘火智能科技有限公司，团队长期专注于柔性机器人技术与睡眠、压力与家庭健康关护。公司以睡眠场景为切入点，自主研发了睡眠安抚机器人MoYa。该产品融合机器人技术、神经科学与心理学，采用无摄像头设计，通过模拟拥抱帮助用户缓解身心压力。

家庭场景下的情感与健康关护，长期面临一个“人机关系”设计上的根本问题：在需要身心双重安抚的场景里，机器应该以怎样的方式“在场”？

过去几年，不同产品从多个维度给出答案。智能床垫、白噪音机擅长改善环境与生理舒适度；可穿戴设备精于睡眠数据的连续监测；毛绒玩具在情绪投射与安全感的建立上有天然优势；新兴的AI对话机器人则在更自然的表达，促进沟通方面快速迭代。

触觉安抚传递物

chinese_news.title: 曼联，要被卖了
chinese_news.summary:
图片来源：视觉中国

作者/余梦莹

报道/投资界PEdaily

史上最盛大世界杯正在上演。

48支球队、39天、104场比赛，总奖金飙升至8.71亿美元。梅西、C罗、莫德里奇“最后一舞”，哈兰德、姆巴佩、亚马尔崛起，诸神之战拉开帷幕。

赛场之外，一家老牌足球豪门却站在了十字路口——彭博社消息，掌控英超球队曼联超20年的格雷泽家族内部，近期正在讨论出售事宜。

绰号“红魔”，这是英格兰足球史上最富盛名的豪门。

chinese_news.title: 36氪研究院 | AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑
chinese_news.summary:
在AI浪潮重塑全球产业逻辑的当下，传统留学路径所依赖的学历溢价与信息差正在系统性失效，大量高薪专业的基础性任务面临被AI批量化替代的风险。70/80后家长遭遇教育投资回报率骤降，05后年轻一代则陷入人机协同时代“何以确立自身不可替代价值”的身份焦虑。面对旧共识瓦解、新航线未明的历史性分水岭，36氪研究院与新通教育联合发布《AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑》。白皮书基于新通三十年积累的百万级家庭服务数据及36氪研究院对2030年全球新兴产业集群的前瞻研判，倡导回归全生命周期的长期主义，为留学家庭提供一份客观、中立的未来就业生存指南。

从“向外破局”到“向内扎根”：中国留学生三十年心理变迁史

中国留学行业三十年，其底层逻辑是一部中产家庭的教育焦虑与价值观重塑史。留学意义经历了五个阶段的变迁——从生存驱动、打破信息垄断的拓荒破冰，到追逐名校光环的晋升通道，再到就业预期前置的工具理性内卷，继而转入风险规避与心理议题凸显的疫情重塑期，直至当下AI浪潮中意义感赤字、情感支撑成为刚需的新阶段。

越来越多CVC在路上

作者 | 冯晓亭

chinese_news.title: 读懂SpaceX的两万亿故事：为什么马斯克每一手棋，永远都可以提前摆好？
chinese_news.summary:
飞向宇宙、浩瀚无垠

作者｜曹思颀

编辑｜靖宇

6 月 12 日，在 SpaceX 正式挂牌当天，马斯克选择前往得州的星舰基地，和数百名员工一起，远程敲响了纳斯达克的开市钟。

在现场，他用熟悉的那股自嘲范儿说：「如果当年有人告诉我会有今天，我大概率觉得那个人嗑嗨了。因为当时我自己都认为这家公司会黄。」

这一天，SpaceX 正式登陆纳斯达克，发行价 135 美元，募资约 750 亿美元；

chinese_news.title: 突发！Anthropic全球停用Claude 5
chinese_news.summary:
究竟为何，Anthropic突然下线了地表最强Claude？

【导读】上线72小时，最强Claude Fable 5被一纸禁令全球下架，连Anthropic自家外籍员工都不许碰。

太突然了！

就在刚刚，Anthropic官宣——

全球禁用外籍人士对Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5的所有访问权限。

无论是在美国境内还是境外，就连Anthropic的外籍员工，全都不可用。

上线才3天的Clau

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 核心材料成本降至进口材料五分之一，电致变色技术厂商获投，车规级产线建设中
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，中科电墨近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，由西安龙鼎投资独家投资。本轮融资将主要用于车规级电致变色产线建设、核心材料研发迭代以及汽车领域市场拓展。

伴随新能源汽车向智能化、舒适化方向升级，汽车玻璃正从传统结构件逐步演变为集隔热、防晒、隐私保护和交互体验于一体的功能件。尤其是全景天幕快速普及后，调光玻璃开始成为车企提升产品差异化的重要配置之一。

目前市场主流调光技术主要包括PDLC（液晶调光）、SPD（悬浮粒子调光）以及EC（电致变色）三种路线。PDLC和SPD主要依靠光散射实现遮蔽效果，普遍存在雾度较高、隔热能力有限、驱动电压较高等问题。而电致变色技术则通过材料发生氧化还原反应，实现玻璃透光率变化，不仅能够实现连续调光，同时具备低雾度、低能耗以及隔绝红外热辐射等优势，被认为是下一代智能玻璃的重要技术路线之一。

中科电墨成立于2023年，专注于电致变色核心材料及器件研发。公司首席科学家马明明博士长期从事导电高分子材料研究，于2017年成功研发出相关核心材料体系。通过引入自主设计的导电聚合物材料，中科电墨突破了长期由海外

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Fed cut the federal funds rate below 4.0% by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve official rate announcement; Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran peace deal and de-escalation may accelerate disinflation narrative, but market currently prices in only 1–2 cuts; inflation sticky in U.S. makes below-4% outcome uncertain.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump G7 summit attendance signals foreign policy reset; if Iran deal stabilizes, oil volatility drops and inflation expectations decline.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the S&P 500 close the second half of 2026 (June 30–Dec 31) with positive returns above 5%?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: S&P 500 closing price on June 30, 2026 vs. December 31, 2026; Yahoo Finance or Bloomberg terminal
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Geopolitical de-escalation (Iran deal, G7 summit coordination) removes tail risk; SpaceX IPO and tokenized treasury growth ($14.6B) suggest institutional confidence.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Iran peace signing (expected early May 2026) eliminates Strait of Hormuz risk premium; corporate earnings multiples may re-expand on lower risk.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will tokenized U.S. Treasury assets exceed $25 billion in AUM by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinDesk industry tracker; Ethereum Dune Analytics tokenized treasury dashboard; Ondo Finance and Usual protocol TVL data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Currently at $14.6B; SEC tokenization path widening (CoinDesk: 'SEC's big swing to clear tokenization path'); institutional appetite rising post-SpaceX IPO legitimacy.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Wall Street and crypto convergence accelerating; JP Morgan, BlackRock entering tokenized asset space; Trump administration likely supportive of innovation.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Meta successfully divest or spin off its new AI model developed by Alexandr Wang by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC filings (8-K, 10-Q); Meta earnings calls and press releases; Crunchbase or Axios deal tracker
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reported underwhelming results from Wang's year-long project; Zuckerberg forced to sell suggests pressure to move fast; limited but viable market for specialized AI.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Meta's continued capex struggles; competitive pressure from OpenAI/Anthropic; potential buyer interest from Microsoft, Google, or sovereign wealth funds.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin close 2026 (Dec 31, 2026) above $80,000?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap, CoinGecko, or Bitstamp BTC/USD closing price on 2026-12-31
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran peace deal removes geopolitical premium but opens risk-on environment; SpaceX institutional legitimacy + tokenized treasury growth signal macro tailwinds; current price near $65K allows 23%+ upside.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Fed rate cuts (if executed); stablecoin adoption surge ($14.6B treasury market); corporate BTC reserves (SpaceX model) become mainstream post-2026.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC/USD and short DXY (U.S. Dollar Index) as Iran peace deal reduces geopolitical premium and Fed begins rate-cut cycle in H2 2026.
supporting_signals: Trump announces Iran peace signing (May 5, 2026); de-escalation removes Strait of Hormuz risk premium historically bullish for risk assets.
CoinDesk: Bitcoin nearing $65K on peace deal optimism; historically, BTC rallies 15–25% on geopolitical de-risk.
Fed likely to cut rates if inflation stabilizes post-oil-shock relief; DXY inversely correlated with rate cuts and risk appetite.
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran deal collapses or proves fragile (Tehran contradicting Trump's Sunday deadline claim); geopolitical tensions reignite and push oil higher, forcing Fed hold; DXY strengthens on safe-haven demand.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perpetual (2–3x leverage, Binance/Deribit), short DXY via ProShares UUP put spreads or FX forward contracts

investment_theses.thesis: Long tokenized U.S. Treasury ETPs (via Ondo Finance, Usual) and short traditional TLT (iShares 20+ Year Treasury) as institutional adoption accelerates and regulatory clarity emerges.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Tokenized treasuries hit $14.6B AUM; 'Wall Street and crypto are crashing into each other'; SEC pathway widening for tokenization rule.
Meta, SpaceX, and major tech firms entering tokenized asset space post-IPO liquidity event.
Ethereum Kohaku and Layer 2 scaling enable sub-cent transaction costs; institutional yield arbitrage favors on-chain treasuries.
investment_theses.counter_view: SEC stalls tokenization rule indefinitely; traditional TLT remains safer and more liquid for institutions; custody and regulatory uncertainty delay institutional flows.
investment_theses.expression: Long Ondo Finance (ONDO) token; long Usual Protocol (USUAL) via Uniswap or Curve; short TLT ETF via put spreads or synthetic short

investment_theses.thesis: Long Solana (SOL) and Backpack (BP) as ecosystem consolidation under Backpack wallet and Siren prediction markets drive retail adoption post-Aerodrome upgrade.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Aerodrome is turning liquidity into a prediction market with its biggest upgrade yet'; prediction markets are high-engagement, venture-backed trend.
Backpack (BP) trending on crypto markets; Solana ecosystem increasingly unified under single wallet/DEX stack.
Siren (SIREN) trending; prediction markets historically drive 3–5x engagement multiples post-launch.
investment_theses.counter_view: Prediction market regulation hardens (SEC cracks down on unregistered gambling); Solana network congestion returns; Ethereum L2s (Aerodrome competitor) capture developer mindshare.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL 3–5x perp (Binance/Deribit); long BP token position via Backpack DEX or Marinade LST; small-cap bet on SIREN prediction market token if liquid

investment_theses.thesis: Long ETH/BTC ratio as Ethereum quantum-proofing narrative and tokenized asset regulatory clarity outpace Bitcoin's pure store-of-value narrative through Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Ethereum quantum-proof accounts feasible at 7-cent cost via Kohaku; security narrative emerging before NIST post-quantum standards finalize.
Tokenized treasury and institutional blockchain adoption favor Ethereum Layer 2 economics; Solana struggles with scalability narrative.
Fed rate clarity + geopolitical de-risk favor yield-bearing assets (ETH staking, tokenized assets) over non-yielding BTC.
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin dominance reasserts as macro tail-hedge; quantum threat remains theoretical; ETH staking yields compress as capital floods in.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH perp 2–3x, short BTC perp 1x, hedge via tight stop-loss; or use Deribit spread: long ETH call, short BTC call, same expiry

investment_theses.thesis: Long consumer hardware and robotics plays (via SoulX capital raise, Chinese VC trend) as AI automation narrative drives home robotics IPOs in 2026–2027.
supporting_signals: 36Kr exclusive: High-end VC (Hillhouse Capital/高瓴) backing SoulX flexible robot company; first product MoYa shipping H2 2026.
Chinese AI/robotics sentiment strong (36Kr macro coverage); global trend toward embodied AI creates hardware tailwind.
Anthropic Claude suspension may redirect AI capex toward robotics and edge hardware; consumer robotics less regulatory risk.
investment_theses.counter_view: Home robotics remains niche; consumer adoption slower than expected; Tesla Optimus competition or Nvidia edge-AI accelerators cannibalize margins.
investment_theses.expression: If SoulX IPOs in 2026–2027, long IPO tranche; otherwise long robotics ETFs (IRBT, PATH) or Nvidia (NVDA) as foundational infrastructure play; direct long Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) as supply-chain beneficiary
